I build, manage, and secure IT environments. Below is a curated list of key projects that highlight my capabilities in IT leadership, technical execution, and strategic management. Click on any project to read the full story.

Drivy

  • Enterprise-Wide 1Password Deployment at Drivy - Secure credential management initiative.

Getaround

  • Achieving TISAX Compliance at Getaround - Enhancing information security for automotive standards.

Jellysmack

  • IT Lead for Jellysmack USA HQ Relocation to Los Angeles - Establishing the new Los Angeles tech hub.

Alan

  • Implementing AWS Workspaces for Specialized Needs at Alan - Providing secure Windows environments on demand.

Qonto

  • Streamlining IT Asset Management at Qonto with Reftab - Enhancing IT asset visibility and control.

Buzzman

  • Optimizing Google Workspace Operations at Buzzman - Streamlining collaboration and administration.

New projects will be added as they are documented.
